Export.zv: IRIS for UNIX (Ubuntu Server LTS for x86-64 Containers) 2026.1 (Build 234U)

Class.name: api.file.disp
Class.Description: Upload file. Dispatch class defined by RESTSpec in api.file.spec

Parameter.name: SpecificationClass
Parameter.Description: The class containing the RESTSpec which generated this class

Parameter.name: IgnoreWrites
Parameter.Description: Ignore any writes done directly by the REST method.

Parameter.name: CONTENTTYPE
Parameter.Description: Default the Content-Type for this application.

Parameter.name: CONVERTINPUTSTREAM
Parameter.Description: By default convert the input stream to Unicode

XData.name: UrlMap
XData.Data: <Routes> <!-- Upload a file --> <Route Url="/upload-file" Method="post" Call="uploadFile" /> </Routes>

Method.name: uploadFile
